basic_details.job_title: Chandigarh Administration Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Chandigarh Administration (CA) has published the Accountant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Accountant position. Candidates meeting the age criteria as per the official notification and holding a PG Degree in Commerce/Accounting or CWA-Inter/CA-Inter with at least 50% marks and the prescribed experience are eligible to apply offline at chandigarh.gov.in. The application process is currently active and will remain open until 31 July 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application form below.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: PG degree in Commerce/ Accounting/ CWA-Inter/CA-Inter with at least 50% marks.
qualification.details: Accountant: PG degree in Commerce/ Accounting/ CWA-Inter/CA-Inter with at least 50% marks. At least 3 years' experience in accounting with exposure in budgeting & audit out of which 1 year should be in Government PSU. Expertise in MS Office including Word, Excel and PowerPoint. Or Government employees retired as Accountant with at least five years' experience/Accounts Officer/Audit Officer with at least 3 years' experience.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://chandigarh.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chandigarh Administration Accountant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Chandigarh Administration Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Chandigarh Administration Accountant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Accountant: PG degree in Commerce/ Accounting/ CWA-Inter/CA-Inter with at least 50% marks. At least 3 years' experience in accounting with exposure in budgeting & audit out of which 1 year should be in Government PSU. Expertise in MS Office including Word, Excel and PowerPoint. Or Government employees retired as Accountant with at least five years' experience/Accounts Officer/Audit Officer with at least 3 years' experience.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for Age Limit details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://chandigarh.gov.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Chandigarh Administration Accountant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Chandigarh Administration Accountant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Chandigarh Administration Accountant post is 31st July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Accountant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,000/-. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Accountant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PG degree in Commerce/Accounting/CWA-Inter/CA-Inter with at least 50% marks. Additionally, at least 3 years of accounting experience is required, with 1 year in a Government PSU. Retired government employees with relevant experience are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Accountant post announced by the Chandigarh Administration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Chandigarh Administration Accountant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Accountant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Accountant post will be based on an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Accountant position?
faq.answer: The Accountant position is a contract-based job with the Chandigarh Administration.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Chandigarh Administration, which is https://chandigarh.gov.in/. Links are provided in the "Important Links" section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the experience required for the Accountant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need at least 3 years of experience in accounting, including exposure to budgeting and audit, with at least 1 year in a Government PSU. Retired government employees with specific experience are also considered.
